artPrompt: A heavy iron vault door sunk into the earth beneath a tattered big-top tent, its blank illegible dial catching hot-gold lamplight, scattered dice and coins on the dirt before it, lurid bulbs and ember sparks hazing through carnival-red gloom into smoky black above, no figures, the buried hoard radiating tender greedy dread, rendered as soft pastel impressionism — hazy diffuse light, visible chalky texture, gentle gradients, dreamy muted color.
name: The Vault Under the Big Top
text:
{T}: Add {B} or {R}.
{3}, {T}: You gain 2 life and create a Treasure token. Everyone assumes the carnival's money is in a satchel under a clown's bed. It is in a vault the size of a town, directly beneath the center pole.
flavorText: The combination is the highest number anyone at this table has ever rolled. Nobody remembers it. The vault does.
